title: cDNA Library Preparation for scRNA-seq of Human Meniscus (10x Genomics)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"q61k","text":"Samples are processed using V2 barcoding chemistry kits of 10x Genomics. For each run, 10,000 cells from individual donors are labeled with distinct oligo-barcoded antibodies (cell hashing), enabling us to pool samples from both conditions on each 10X Genomics run and reduce batch effects. All samples from a given experiment are processed in parallel in the same thermal cycler. The 10x user guide can be found https://assets.ctfassets.net/an68im79xiti/1C16trEdzy1Folq5xbOijE/7e6fb1f504e130bd561d898384da99d9/CG000315_ChromiumNextGEMSingleCell3-_GeneExpression_v3.1_DualIndex__RevB.pdf and is also an attached document.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":413,"length":174}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"91FC6872C71C11ECB7380A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://assets.ctfassets.net/an68im79xiti/1C16trEdzy1Folq5xbOijE/7e6fb1f504e130bd561d898384da99d9/CG000315_ChromiumNextGEMSingleCell3-_GeneExpression_v3.1_DualIndex__RevB.pdf"}}}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"251ub","text":"Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3’ GEM Kit v3.1, 16 rxns PN-1000123 ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"76uih","text":"Library Construction Kit, 16 rxns PN-1000190 ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"behdn","text":"Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3’ Gel Bead Kit v3.1, 16 rxns PN-1000122","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"co05v","text":"Dynabeads™ MyOne™ SILANE PN-2000048","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7tha2","text":"Chromium Next GEM Chip G Single Cell Kit, 16 rxns PN-1000127","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1b6f5","text":"Dual Index Kit TT Set A, 96 rxns PN-1000215","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4cq56","text":"BD Hu Single Cell Sample Multiplexing Kit cat# 633781","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Single cells are isolated from human knee menicus using doi dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.n2bvj6k7blk5/v1 .

Single cell suspensions are multiplexed and converted to barcoded scRNAseq libraries using the Chromium Single Cell 3’ Library, Gel Bead and Chip Kit (10x Genomics), and the BD™ Hu Single Cell Sample Multiplexing Kit . Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3’ Reagent Kits v3.1 (Dual Index) User Guide https://assets.ctfassets.net/an68im79xiti/1C16trEdzy1Folq5xbOijE/7e6fb1f504e130bd561d898384da99d9/CG000315_ChromiumNextGEMSingleCell3-_GeneExpression_v3.1_DualIndex__RevB.pdf
Libraries are sequenced on an Illumina NextSeq2000 sequencer targeting 20,000-25,000 reads per cell.
creator: Merissa Olmer
